name: Lucky – Clover MCP
description: Model Context Protocol server for Clover POS — giving AI agents direct access to restaurant operations: menu management, orders, inventory, analytics, customer retention, financial reporting, and more
author: Dokdo Solutions

tools.name: Order Management
tools.description: Query orders, filter by date/status, inspect line items, delivery platform filtering

tools.name: Customer Management
tools.description: Search, create, profile customers with lifetime spend

tools.name: Inventory Management
tools.description: Stock levels, low-stock alerts, adjustments, auto-86

tools.name: Analytics
tools.description: Revenue by period, peak hours, best-sellers, category breakdown

tools.name: Employee Management
tools.description: Shift activity, hours worked, clock-in/out visibility

tools.name: Financial Reporting
tools.description: Daily/weekly/monthly summaries, tender breakdowns, tax reporting

tools.name: Customer Retention
tools.description: Lapsed customers, win-back messaging, birthday outreach, first-time visitors

tools.name: Operations
tools.description: Refund rates, open orders, void detection, table turn analysis

tools.name: Forecasting
tools.description: Week-over-week trends, seasonal patterns, staffing signals

tools.name: Menu Operations
tools.description: Bulk pricing updates, happy hour scheduling, allergen tagging

tools.name: Smart Queries
tools.description: Cross-module insights, happy hour analysis, upsell opportunities
